overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dimly lit industrial corridor in a video game. The player approaches a metal security gate at the end of the hallway, passing a no-smoking sign mounted on the concrete wall. The atmosphere is tense with cool-toned artificial lighting casting shadows across the narrow passage.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow industrial corridor toward the metal gate at the end

entered.detail: rough concrete wall running along the left side of the narrow passage
rough concrete wall running along the right side of the narrow passage
illuminated red and white no smoking sign mounted on the left wall
large metal roll-down security gate with diamond pattern blocking the end of the corridor
overhead industrial light fixture casting a cool white glow downward

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow industrial corridor with concrete walls. A no-smoking sign is visible on the left wall, and a metal security gate stands at the far end of the hallway. The space is dimly lit by overhead artificial lighting, creating a cool-toned, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching metal security gate at corridor end

events.description: camera approaches very close to the metal security gate, filling the frame with the gate details

agents.ego_description: continuing forward until very close to the metal security gate, examining the barrier at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving forward through the corridor, approaching the metal security gate until it dominates the view. The no-smoking sign and side walls exit the frame as the camera focuses on the gate barrier ahead. The overhead light fixture appears closer as the camera advances toward the end of the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dimly lit industrial corridor that culminates in a close encounter with a security barrier. It begins by advancing through a narrow passage with concrete walls, passing a no-smoking sign mounted on the left under cool-toned artificial lighting. As the camera moves forward, the side walls and signage gradually exit the frame, narrowing the focus toward the end of the hallway. The scene then shifts as the overhead light fixtures draw closer, before the metal security gate expands to dominate the entire field of view.
